block_01: We at IQ Option are thrilled to announce our 10th anniversary, and we couldn't have done it without your trust and support. Over the past decade, we've been on an incredible journey, and we're excited to celebrate this milestone with you!
block_02: To mark this special occasion, we have prepared a series of pleasant surprises to share. The first present will be unveiled on November 8th, so don’t forget to check your inbox for the big reveal!
block_07: The details of the second surprise will be revealed on November 13th —
block_08: stay tuned for more surprises coming your way.
